Delete Your Account

SBA Incubator · com.sba.marathon99days

Developer: Saudi Biotech Accelerator · Last updated: April 24, 2026

Summary: You can delete your SBA Incubator account at any time, either directly in the app or by emailing us. Deletion is permanent and removes your profile and all content you've submitted. A limited set of records is retained for legal and security purposes as described below.

How to request account deletion

Method 1 — From inside the app (recommended)

  1. Open the SBA Incubator app on your Android device.
  2. Sign in with your account.
  3. Tap Account (bottom navigation) → scroll to the bottom.
  4. Tap Delete your account.
  5. Read the confirmation warning and tap Delete to confirm.

Your account and data are deleted immediately and you will be signed out.

Method 2 — By email

If you cannot access the app, email us at support@sba-marathon.com from the email address registered on your account, with the subject line "Delete my SBA Incubator account".

We will verify your identity (by confirming you own the email) and delete the account within 7 business days. You will receive a confirmation email when the deletion is complete.

What is deleted

When you delete your account, the following data is permanently removed from our database and cannot be recovered:

  • Your profile (full name, email, phone, country, city, professional background, innovation field, idea description, and all onboarding answers)
  • Your password hash and authentication sessions
  • All daily task submissions, reflections, and open-ended responses you have written
  • All files you have uploaded (photos, documents, attachments)
  • Your progress (current day, completed task count, streak)
  • Your push notification tokens
  • Your earned certificates (issued for day 33 / day 66 / day 99 milestones)

What is retained and why

A limited set of records is retained after account deletion to meet legal, security, and operational obligations:

Data retainedReasonRetention period
Anonymized audit log entries (login events, security events — with your user identifier replaced by deleted-user) Security and fraud prevention 12 months, then deleted
Anonymized, aggregated analytics (for example, "N users completed day 5") — with no reference to you individually Improving the program and the app Indefinite (no personal data)
Email-based request records, if you deleted via email (method 2) Proof of deletion on request 24 months, then deleted
Important: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. If you wish to re-join the 99-day program in the future, you will need to register a new account and start from day 1. Certificates you have earned are not transferable to a new account.

Partial data deletion

Our current app does not offer a separate flow to delete specific pieces of data while keeping your account active — account deletion removes everything at once, as described above. If you need to correct or remove specific information without deleting your account, contact us at support@sba-marathon.com.

Questions

Questions about this policy or about the deletion of your account can be sent to support@sba-marathon.com.

Full privacy practices are described in our Privacy Policy.
